role_in_this_package: Primary in-vivo fibroblast ECM/collagen module in UVB photoaging (exploratory, cell-level; one sample per condition)
Cultured human dermal fibroblast aging (n=133 donors) — honest in-vitro/bulk bound (senescence rises with age, ECM module flat)
Replicate-aware in-vivo UVB reanalysis (n=3/group; NoUVB vs UVB-saline only; treatment arm excluded)
129-gene human matrisome photoaging/aging signature compiled from published public studies
Documented 2018-2026 systematic screen of public skin-aging datasets (33 candidates, per-accession verified)
